metadata.title: 学术 + 标准 + 开源 — 勒索检测与误报控制 深度调研
metadata.scope: 2023-2026 学术论文 + 行业标准 + 开源工具/数据集 + 反误报研究
metadata.verification_policy: 每条目至少 1 个可访问 URL (HTTP 200/已知可访问); 数据集/标准/开源项目均使用官方源

papers.title: Ransomware Detection through Temporal Correlation between Encryption and I/O Behavior (RansomRadar)
papers.authors: Lihua Guo, Yiwei Hou, Chijin Zhou, Quan Zhang, Yu Jiang
papers.venue: Proceedings of the ACM on Software Engineering (FSE 2025)
papers.key_finding: 提出加密负载与 I/O 行为的时间相关性作为勒索不变特征; 对 411 个样本 (89 家族) 检测率 100%, 误报率仅 2.68%, F1=96.03, 比现有检测器高 31.82.
papers.method: 加密检测 (KNN) + LSTM 时间相关性建模 + Windows HPC/IRP 数据采集
papers.dataset: 411 samples, 89 ransomware families; GitHub 公开

papers.title: Learning the Language of NVMe Streams for Ransomware Detection
papers.authors: Barak Bringoltz, Elisha Halperin, Ran Feraru, Evgeny Blaichman, Amit Berman (Samsung Semiconductor Israel)
papers.key_finding: 针对 NVMe 命令流的语言建模: Command-Level Transformer (CLT) + Patch-Level Transformer (PLT); 比 tabular SOTA 漏检率降 24%, 数据丢失防护提升 66%, 识别勒索访问数据量提升 84%.
papers.method: Transformer-based token classification + 预测每 patch 勒索访问量
papers.dataset: 1,464 streams (Samsung 自采集, NVMe 命令级标注)

papers.title: iCNN-LSTM+: A Batch-Based Incremental Ransomware Detection System Using Sysmon
papers.authors: Jamil Ispahany, MD Rafiqul Islam, M. Arif Khan, MD Zahidul Islam
papers.key_finding: 增量学习 CNN+LSTM + 注意力机制 + SMOTE 处理不平衡 Sysmon 日志; F2=99.65%, FPR=0.16%, FNR=3.96%.
papers.method: Parallel CNN + LSTM + Attention + Batch-Incremental learning

papers.title: Detecting Ransomware Despite I/O Overhead: A Practical Multi-Staged Approach
papers.authors: Christian van Sloun, Vincent Woeste, Konrad Wolsing, Jan Pennekamp, Klaus Wehrle (RWTH Aachen)
papers.key_finding: 针对 I/O 监控开销难题, 提出多阶段检测策略 + 7,796 个活跃勒索样本的 Maraudermap 数据集.
papers.method: Multi-staged detection (每阶段独立轻量检测器)

papers.title: Crypto-ransomware Detection through Quantitative API-based Behavioral Profiling
papers.authors: Wenjia Song, Sanjula Karanam, Ya Xiao, Jingyuan Qi, Nathan Dautenhahn, Na Meng, Elena Ferrari, Danfeng (Daphne) Yao
papers.key_finding: 基于 API 行为一致性分析 + contrast refinement, 有效检测所有勒索执行 + 显著降低 FP.

papers.title: Pulse: Zero Day Ransomware Detection with Transformer Models and Assembly Language
papers.authors: Matthew Gaber, Mohiuddin Ahmed, Helge Janicke (Edith Cowan University)
papers.key_finding: Peekaboo DBI 捕获汇编指令, 用 Transformer 进行 zero-day 检测, 利用 Zipf 分布特性.
papers.method: Transformer model + Peekaboo Dynamic Binary Instrumentation

papers.title: Graph-Contrast Ransomware Detection (GCRD) with Advanced Feature Selection and Deep Learning
papers.key_finding: GFS + 对比学习 + FT-Transformer, 99.1% 准确率 + 1.5% FPR, 55ms 内分类, 适合企业实时部署.
papers.method: Graph feature selection + Contrastive learning + FT-Transformer

papers.title: RANsomCheck: A CNN-Transformer Model for Malware Detection Based on API Call Sequences
papers.authors: Yi-Xuan Wu, Ying-Xuan Ho, Pang-Po Cheng, Chin-Yu Sun et al.
papers.venue: Lecture Notes in Computer Science (LNAI 15707), IEA/AIE 2025
papers.key_finding: 基于 Cuckoo 沙箱动态分析 + quadruple semantic representation + CNN+Transformer; 准确率 99.94%, 精度 99.92%, 召回 100%, F1 99.96%.
papers.method: Embedding + CNN + Transformer on API call sequences
papers.dataset: Windows PE files via Cuckoo Sandbox

papers.title: Early Ransomware Detection with Deep Learning Models (CNN/LSTM on API call sequences)
papers.authors: Matan Davidian, Michael Kiperberg, Natalia Vanetik (Shamoon College of Engineering)
papers.key_finding: context window 7 最优; CNN 与 LSTM 表现最佳; 加入 operation result 显著提升 precision.
papers.method: CNN + LSTM on API call name + operation result

papers.title: A hybrid ensemble model (DT+ANN+XGBoost) for ransomware detection with SHAP explainability
papers.key_finding: DT+ANN+XGBoost 集成 99.87% 准确率 + SHAP 可解释; 比 CNN(98.26%), ANN(99.01%), SVM(96.66%) 都高.
papers.method: Decision Tree + ANN + XGBoost ensemble + PCA feature selection + SHAP

papers.title: Hierarchical Entropy Disruption (HED) for Ransomware Detection
papers.key_finding: 基于多层级熵扰动分析, 高准确率 + 低计算开销; 抵抗混淆技术.

papers.title: On Countering Ransomware Attacks Using Strategic Deception
papers.authors: Roshan Lal Neupane, Bishnu Bhusal et al. (Missouri S&T)
papers.venue: Lecture Notes in Computer Science (LNCS 14908), Springer
papers.key_finding: 博弈论方法在勒索攻击各阶段部署 deception assets (honeytokens/honeypots/honeyfiles).
papers.method: Multi-stage ransomware game + Subgame-Perfect Nash Equilibrium (SPNE)

papers.title: Enhancing ransomware defense: deep learning-based detection and family-wise classification (GN-BiLSTM)
papers.authors: Amjad Hussain, Ayesha Saadia, Musaed Alhussein, Ammara Gul, Khursheed Aurangzeb
papers.key_finding: RNN-based GN-BiLSTM 检测 + 多分类 (类别+家族); 11 个勒索家族 + 26 个恶意软件家族.

papers.title: Leveraging User Entity Behavior Analytics for Advanced Ransomware Detection
papers.key_finding: 将 UEBA 应用于勒索检测, 弥补传统签名的不足.
papers.method: UEBA framework applied to ransomware scenarios

papers.title: A-UEBA: An Anomaly Heterogeneity Learning Framework Based on Multi-Endpoint User and Entity Behavior Analysis
papers.venue: Proceedings of the 2025 International Conference on Embodied Intelligence and Large Models
papers.key_finding: UEBA + 异构学习 + 在线学习范式; 比最优 baseline 提升 22.5%, recall 提升 39.8%, F1 提升 38.8%.
papers.method: Feature extraction + Encoder + Supervised + Clustering + Online learning
papers.dataset: Multi-endpoint UEBA datasets + insider threat test set

papers.title: Entropy Sharing in Ransomware: Bypassing Entropy-Based Detection of Cryptographic Operations
papers.key_finding: 揭示熵检测局限: 单纯 Shannon 熵判别加密 vs 非加密会产生大量 FP/FN; 提出 entropy sharing 绕过技术.

papers.title: Ransomware detection based on server-side file operation logs using machine learning
papers.venue: EURASIP Journal on Information Security (Springer Open)
papers.key_finding: 基于服务器端文件操作日志的 ML 检测方法 (Open Access), 适合服务端侧加密保护.
papers.method: ML on server-side file operation logs

papers.title: UNVEIL: A Large-Scale, Automated Approach to Detecting Ransomware (经典奠基论文)
papers.authors: Amin Kharraz, Sajjad Arshad, Collin Mulliner, William Robertson, Engin Kirda
papers.key_finding: 经典勒索检测论文 (FPR=0.0%); 9,872 新检测样本 (72.2%) 当时 AV 全军覆没.
papers.method: Dynamic analysis + tracking file tampering + desktop changes

standards.name: NIST SP 1800-25 Data Integrity: Identifying and Protecting Assets Against Ransomware
standards.scope: NCCoE 实践指南: 识别 + 保护资产免受勒索/破坏性事件; 含备份、安全存储、完整性检查、审计日志、漏洞管理方案.

standards.name: NIST SP 1800-11 Data Integrity: Recovering from Ransomware
standards.scope: 勒索事件后的恢复操作流程; 备份验证、恢复测试、完整恢复计划.

standards.name: NIST SP 1800-26 Data Integrity: Detecting and Responding to Ransomware
standards.scope: 检测与响应流程; SIEM 集成、EDR 编排.

standards.name: MITRE ATT&CK T1486 Data Encrypted for Impact
standards.scope: 勒索加密的核心技术 (Enterprise); 含检测策略 DET0215 (AN0602/0603/0604 多平台/工具/用户态检测).

standards.name: MITRE ATT&CK T1490 Inhibit System Recovery
standards.scope: 勒索通过 vssadmin/wbadmin/cipher 删除备份或卷影副本, 阻碍恢复.

standards.name: MITRE ATT&CK T1489 Service Stop + T1562 Impair Defenses
standards.scope: 勒索停止/禁用安全服务以规避检测, 是 CTID Ransomware Top 10 第 7 位.

standards.name: MITRE D3FEND (Detection, Denial, and Disruption Framework Empowering Network Defense)
standards.scope: 200+ 防御技术, 7 类战术 (Model/Harden/Detect/Isolate/Deceive/Evict/Restore); 与 ATT&CK 双向映射; 勒索关键防御: D3-PA Process Analysis, D3-EAL Executable Allow Listing, D3-DE Decoy Environment.

standards.name: CISA #StopRansomware Guide
standards.scope: CISA + FBI + NSA 联合指南; 准备/预防/缓解最佳实践 + 事件响应清单; 映射 CISA CPG; 2025 年 3 月最新文档.

standards.name: NCSC UK Mitigating Malware and Ransomware Attacks
standards.scope: 英国国家网络安全中心勒索与恶意软件缓解指南; 含感染前/感染后行动.

standards.name: ACSC Australian Cyber Security Centre Ransomware Prevention Guide
standards.scope: ASD/ACSC 勒索预防/响应/恢复分步指南; 含 9 步响应流程; 永不支付赎金立场.

standards.name: CSA Singapore Ransomware Portal
standards.scope: CSA + 新加坡警察部队勒索一站式资源; 含全球趋势、变种、解密工具、IR 检查表; 2024 年记录 159 起勒索事件 (+21% YoY).

standards.name: ISO/IEC 27040:2024 Storage Security
standards.scope: 存储安全技术要求; 设备/介质处理、身份验证、访问控制、加密实践; 适用于存储数据静态与传输; 2024 版取代 2015 版.

standards.name: SNIA TLS Specification for Storage Systems
standards.scope: SNIA 存储系统 TLS 使用要求与指南; 促进存储客户端/服务器安全互操作; SMI-S 与 CDMI 的安全基础.

standards.name: SNIA Storage Security Best Current Practices (BCPs)
standards.scope: TCG 与 SNIA 合作的存储安全最佳实践; 提供存储系统/生态系统的广泛指导.

standards.name: NIST Cross-Sector Cybersecurity Performance Goals (CPGs)
standards.scope: CISA + NIST 联合发布的跨行业网络安全绩效目标; #StopRansomware Guide 已映射至 CPGs.

open_source_tools.name: MalwareBazaar (abuse.ch)
open_source_tools.desc: abuse.ch 维护的恶意软件样本库; 支持 YARA 规则搜索; 含 'Ransomware' tag, 31,187 sightings (截至 2026-06); 提供 API.

open_source_tools.name: VirusTotal
open_source_tools.desc: 多引擎扫描 + 行为分析; 提供 Public/Private API; YARA 引擎集成的开源核心: github.com/VirusTotal/yara

open_source_tools.name: YARA Engine (VirusTotal)
open_source_tools.desc: 官方 YARA 引擎; 模式匹配规则语言; 勒索检测规则标准载体.

open_source_tools.name: ReversingLabs YARA Rules
open_source_tools.desc: 928 stars, 119 forks; 100% YARA; 用于勒索/恶意软件/IoC 检测; MIT 协议; 持续更新.

open_source_tools.name: Advanced Threat Research YARA Rules (McAfee ATR, 含 ransomware/)
open_source_tools.desc: 含 Conti/LockBit/REvil 等 30+ 家族勒索 YARA 规则; 公开规则; 持续维护.

open_source_tools.name: yarGen (Florian Roth)
open_source_tools.desc: 自动从恶意软件样本生成 YARA 规则; --excludegood 可显著降低 FP (已被 DragonForceYARA 仓库验证).

open_source_tools.name: ransomware.live YARA Rules by Group
open_source_tools.desc: 358 个勒索组织, 502 条 YARA 规则; 来自社区维护; 含 Akira, BlackCat, LockBit 等活跃家族.

open_source_tools.name: Wazuh (Open Source XDR + SIEM)
open_source_tools.desc: OSSEC 的现代继任者; 含勒索检测规则 (Rule ID 87105); Sysmon + VirusTotal 集成; FIM + Active Response; v4.12.0 (2025-05).

open_source_tools.name: OSSEC HIDS
open_source_tools.desc: 开源 HIDS; v3.8.0 (2021-01); 维护减弱但仍是 Wazuh 基础; 含勒索检测签名.

open_source_tools.name: Velociraptor (Rapid7)
open_source_tools.desc: Rapid7 开源 DFIR 平台; 含 YARA + Sigma 规则; 用于勒索事件响应与端点调查; 注意: 攻击者已滥用旧版 Velociraptor 投递勒索 (Cisco Talos 2025 报告).

open_source_tools.name: HarfangLab EDR (开源 IoCs/YARA)
open_source_tools.desc: 法国 ANSSI CSPN 认证 EDR; 公开 IoC + Sigma + YARA 规则; 开源 EDR 检测引擎 (Rust bindings endpoint-sec); Ransomguard 勒索检测引擎.

open_source_tools.name: OpenCanary (Thinkst)
open_source_tools.desc: 开源蜜罐框架; 多协议 (HTTP/SMB/RDP/SQL/MySQL/SSH 等); 部署蜜罐/honeytoken 触发低 FP 高保真告警.

open_source_tools.name: Canary Tokens (Thinkst)
open_source_tools.desc: 免费 honeytoken 生成器; URL/Word/PDF/DNS/Kerberos 等; 用于勒索早期访问检测.

open_source_tools.name: Microsoft Sentinel UEBA
open_source_tools.desc: 微软云原生 UEBA; 动态行为画像 + peer group + blast radius; 与勒索 IR 集成; 持续学习降低 FP.

open_source_tools.name: Splunk UEBA (Enterprise Security 集成)
open_source_tools.desc: Splunk ES 集成 UEBA; Entity Risk Score 聚合; 用于内部威胁/勒索横向移动检测.

open_source_tools.name: MITRE Caldera + D3FEND Plugins
open_source_tools.desc: MITRE 开源对抗仿真平台; 可模拟勒索 TTP; D3FEND 插件支持自动防御评估.

open_source_tools.name: Awesome-Deception (curated list)
open_source_tools.desc: 182 stars; 蜜罐/honeytoken/欺骗技术资源; 含 D3FEND 链接与 OpenCanary.

datasets.name: CICIDS-2017
datasets.note: 含 Brute Force/Web Attack/Infiltration/Botnet/DDoS/PortScan; 不直接含勒索流量, 需结合其他数据集

datasets.name: CIC-MalMem-2022 (Memory Analysis)
datasets.size: 包含勒索家族内存特征
datasets.note: PE 内存分析; 用于 ransomware 家族分类

datasets.name: Ransomware Dataset 2024 (Zenodo)
datasets.note: Dharma, GandCrab, LockBit, Maze, Phobos, REvil, Ragnar Locker, Ryuk, Shade, WannaCry + 26 个 malware 家族; DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.13890887

datasets.name: RanSAP (Ransomware Storage Access Patterns)
datasets.size: 7 ransomware + 5 benign samples, 21 variants, full drive encryption (BitLocker) variants
datasets.note: hypervisor 采集的存储访问模式; 用于 ML/DL 训练

datasets.name: RanSMAP (Ransomware Storage + Memory Access Patterns)
datasets.size: 6 ransomware + 6 benign, 7 Conti variants, simultaneous execution data
datasets.note: RanSAP 的扩展 (2025); 含 storage + memory access patterns; 多硬件配置

datasets.name: MLRan (Behavioral Ransomware Dataset)
datasets.note: GUIDE-MLRan guidelines + Cuckoo Sandbox workflow + 9 behavioral feature categories; 2-stage feature selection

datasets.name: Ransomwhere (Crowdsourced Ransomware Payments)
datasets.size: 5.6 MB JSON, >$1B 加密货币支付地址
datasets.note: Jack Cable 维护; ransomware family + bitcoin address; crowdsourced

datasets.name: VirusShare (private, citation required)
datasets.note: 需注册 + 引用; 学术研究常用

datasets.name: SNIA IOTTA Storage Traces
datasets.note: 真实企业存储 workload traces; 用于 storage 异常检测基线

datasets.name: ransomware.live IOC Index
datasets.note: 实时更新的勒索 IOC + YARA 索引; 358 groups

key_works: Limits of I/O Based Ransomware Detection (IEEE S&P 2023)

false_positive_research.summary: 误报控制不是凑数, 而是 SOC 真实痛点. ESG/IDC/Expel 数据显示企业 SOC FP 率长期 50-95%, 世界级 SOC 可降至 <10%.

behavior_vs_signature.signature_based_FP: 高 (依赖 IoC 黑名单; IOC stale + IP 复用导致大量噪声)
behavior_vs_signature.behavior_based_FP: 低-中 (基于熵异常/进程链/文件 I/O; 但易对良性高熵操作 (压缩/备份) 误报)
behavior_vs_signature.deception_based_FP: 极低 (蜜罐/蜜文件任何交互都是异常, 合法用户无业务理由访问)
behavior_vs_signature.UEBA_FP: 低 (行为基线; 但需 1-4 周学习期, 初期 FP 高)

ensemble_methods: DT + ANN + XGBoost (99.87% 准确率, 极低 FP)
Random Forest + DNN (论文综述显示可降低 FP 30-50%)
Stacking ensemble + cost-sensitive Pareto (CSPE-R, 针对 zero-day 误报)
threshold_tuning_best_practices: 1. 90 天 alert metadata 收集 (alert count, investigation time, efficacy)
2. 计算 efficacy 阈值 (TP rate) 与 false positive cumulative time 阈值
3. MITRE ATT&CK 覆盖缺口分析
4. Active learning + human-in-the-loop (HITL) 反馈循环
5. Confidence threshold + alert risk scoring (Microsoft Sentinel Fusion)
6. False positive rate alerting budget (规则不能超 X% FP)

alert_fatigue_research.title: Microsoft 6 Strategies to Reduce Cybersecurity Alert Fatigue
alert_fatigue_research.key_insight: Threat intel + 原生集成 + AI/自动化 + SIEM Fusion + 低优先级去噪

alert_fatigue_research.title: Expel 2026 Annual Threat Report - FP Control via Detection Engineering
alert_fatigue_research.key_insight: 75.6% Expel 监控的 detection 是 Expel 自定义或增强的; 高保真 detection 是核心.

alert_fatigue_research.title: Prophet Security Alert Tuning Best Practices
alert_fatigue_research.key_insight: Data-driven alert tuning; 90 天元数据 + MITRE 覆盖 + efficacy 阈值

alert_fatigue_research.title: Alert Fatigue Killing SOC (DeepLayer)
alert_fatigue_research.key_insight: FP 95%+ 导致分析师流失; tuned rules + baselined thresholds + documented hypotheses 是核心

deception_technology_FP_control.title: Demystifying Deception Technology: A Survey
deception_technology_FP_control.key_insight: 蜜罐/honeytoken 任何交互都是异常, 合法用户无业务理由访问 -> 极低 FP.

deception_technology_FP_control.title: Decryption Digest - 98% alert fidelity vs 5-10% for rule-based SIEM
deception_technology_FP_control.key_insight: 蜜罐检测保真度 98%, 比规则型 SIEM (5-10%) 高一个数量级; 3x 加速横向移动检测.

five_look_three_decide.research_direction:
三方向最有前景:
1) **存储语义理解** (RansomRadar 的 I/O+加密时序相关性, NVMe Language Modeling) - 直接在 SAN/块存储层捕获勒索不变特征, 不依赖主机 EDR.
2) **行为 + 欺骗双层** (UEBA 基线 + honeyfile 兜底) - honeyfile 是 'zero FP detection' 的金标准; 加密蜜文件几乎不可能被合法用户访问.
3) **可解释集成** (DT+ANN+XGBoost + SHAP) - SOC 分析师可审计决策, 降低 alert fatigue.
five_look_three_decide.fp_control_method:
推荐 '三层 FP 控制架构':
Layer 1: **预防** - honeyfile + canary token (蜜罐层, FP<1%, 部署在备份目录和 SMB 共享根目录).
Layer 2: **检测** - 时序相关性 (RansomRadar 风格) + 集成 (DT+XGBoost) 双重降噪; 输出 confidence score >0.95 才触发告警.
Layer 3: **运营** - 90 天 alert efficacy 指标闭环 + MITRE ATT&CK 覆盖盲点分析; FP 阈值硬性约束 (单一规则 FP >5% 自动降级).
关键发现: 单纯加密熵检测 FP 极高 (参考 Sensors 2024 entropy sharing 论文), 必须叠加时序行为特征.
five_look_three_decide.industry_application:
块存储/SAN 场景的工业落地路径:
1) 硬件层: IBM FlashCore Module 5 (FCM5) 已在 FlashSystem 7600/9500 部署 entropy pattern 熵曲线检测; HPE Alletra MP B10000 块存储也支持 ransomware detection (检测到则自动生成只读快照).
2) 软件层: Wazuh + Sysmon + VirusTotal 是开源首选; Splunk/Sentinel UEBA 是商业首选.
3) 数据层: RanSAP / RanSMAP 是块级 ML 训练集; UNB CIC-MalMem-2022 是内存分析训练集.
4) 流程层: 集成 CISA #StopRansomware Guide 的 'pre-ransomware notification' 思路 (Canadian Cyber Centre 2024 年发 336 条通知, 节省 $18M CAD) - 即在加密发生前基于 I/O 异常停止 I/O.
关键差距: 当前多数 EDR 只在加密发生中/后检测; hacms 的优势在于在存储层 + 加密前窗口捕获信号, 大幅降低 FP 和响应时间.
